description: Within-set Galar Water starter evolution-line 1:1 mirror. Sobble (Stage 1, no. 816) -> Drizzile (Stage 2, no. 817) -> Inteleon (Stage 3), with the in-corpus pair being the base-to-mid leg of the line. Adjacent collector numbers (041-042) within Chilling Reign, both Rapid Strike subtype, both Galar starter region affiliates. Mirrors the Charmander/Charmeleon/Charizard wave-14 within-set evolution-line edge pattern. The third stage (Inteleon) is not yet in BBL corpus; if/when it lands this would naturally extend into a chain topology.
other_candidates_considered: Sobble blister-exclusives 054-202 cross-print mirror — defer; blister Sobble is not yet tags_hub enriched, and the within-set Galar adjacency carries more narrative weight than cross-print same-character for a Stage-1 baby form.
Sobble/Drizzile/Inteleon chain topology — Inteleon not in corpus; the chain is exactly one evolution step short and the edge is mirror-shaped at N=2.
